command_line: baseline/run_planner.py What is the average, minimum, and maximum age of all singers from France? concert_singer --dataset spider --input_mode single

inputs.question: What is the average, minimum, and maximum age of all singers from France?

sql:
SELECT AVG(singer.Age) AS average_age, MIN(singer.Age) AS min_age, MAX(singer.Age) AS max_age 
FROM singer 
INNER JOIN singer_in_concert ON singer.Singer_ID = singer_in_concert.Singer_ID 
INNER JOIN concert ON singer_in_concert.concert_ID = concert.concert_ID 
INNER JOIN stadium ON concert.Stadium_ID = stadium.Stadium_ID 
WHERE singer.Country = 'France' 
ORDER BY singer.Age;

command_line: baseline/run_planner.py What are the names, countries, and ages for every singer in descending order of age? concert_singer --dataset spider

inputs.question: What are the names, countries, and ages for every singer in descending order of age?

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name, s.Country, s.Age, c.Year, s_in_c.Singer_ID, s.Stadium_ID 
FROM singer s 
INNER JOIN singer_in_concert s_in_c ON s.Singer_ID = s_in_c.Singer_ID 
INNER JOIN concert c ON s_in_c.concert_ID = c.concert_ID 
INNER JOIN stadium ON c.Stadium_ID = stadium.Stadium_ID 
WHERE s.Is_male = 'True' 
AND c.Year IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY s.Age DESC;

command_line: baseline/run_planner.py Which model has the most version(make) of cars? car_1 --dataset spider --input_mode single

inputs.question: Which model has the most version(make) of cars?

sql:
SELECT COUNT(car_makers.Maker) AS count, car_makers.Maker 
FROM car_makers 
INNER JOIN model_list ON car_makers.Id = model_list.Maker 
INNER JOIN car_names ON model_list.Model = car_names.Model 
INNER JOIN cars_data ON car_names.Make = cars_data.Make 
WHERE cars_data.Make = car_names.Make 
GROUP BY car_makers.Maker 
ORDER BY count DESC 
LIMIT 1;

command_line: baseline/run_planner.py Which model has the most version(make) of cars? car_1 --dataset spider --input_mode single

inputs.question: Which model has the most version(make) of cars?

sql:
SELECT
  T1.Maker
FROM car_makers AS T1
INNER JOIN model_list AS T2
  ON T1.Id = T2.Maker
INNER JOIN car_names AS T3
  ON T2.Model = T3.Model
GROUP BY
  T1.Maker
ORDER BY
  COUNT(T3.Make) DESC
LIMIT 1;
